title: Learn how the BBC is working to strengthen trust and transparency in online news
text:
The BBC is recognised by audiences in the UK and around the world as a provider of news that you can trust. Our website, like our TV and radio services, strives for journalism that is accurate, impartial, independent and fair.
Our editorial values say: "The trust that our audience has in all our content underpins everything that we do. We are independent, impartial and honest. We are committed to achieving the highest standards of accuracy and impartiality and strive to avoid knowingly or materially misleading our audiences.
"Our commitment to impartiality is at the heart of that relationship of trust. In all our output we will treat every subject with an impartiality that reflects the full range of views. We will consider all the relevant facts fairly and with an open mind."
We know that identifying credible journalism on the internet can be a confusing experience. We also know that audiences want to understand more about how BBC journalism is produced.
For these reasons, BBC News is making even greater efforts to explain what type of information you are reading or watching on our website, who and where the information is coming from, and how a story was crafted the way it was. By doing so, we can help you judge for yourself why BBC News can be trusted.
We are also making these indicators of trustworthy journalism "machine-readable", meaning that they can be picked up by search engines and social media platforms, helping them to better identify reliable sources of information too.
The BBC has long had its own Editorial Guidelines that apply to all of our content and set out the standards expected of our journalists. To make it easier to see how BBC guidelines are used in our newsroom, we have listed all the relevant sections on this page.
Mission Statement: The mission of the BBC is to act in the public interest, serving all audiences through the provision of impartial, high-quality and distinctive output and services that inform, educate and entertain. Full details are in the BBC Charter.
Ownership Structure, Funding and Grants: We are independent of outside interests and arrangements that could undermine our editorial integrity. Our audiences should be confident that our decisions are not influenced by outside interests, political or commercial pressures, or any personal interests. Learn more about how BBC News is funded, in the UK and internationally, in the BBC Charter on the independence of the BBC.
Founding Date: The BBC was founded on 18 October 1922. Read more about the history of the BBC.
Ethics Policy: The BBC's Editorial Guidelines outline the editorial values and practices that all our output is expected to conform to.
Diversity Policy: Learn about BBC News' commitment to diversity in the BBC Charter.
Diversity Staffing Report: Find out about how BBC News is working to increase diversity in the BBC's Equality Information Report.
Corrections: The BBC is committed to achieving due accuracy. Policies relating to corrections can be found in the following sections of our Editorial Guidelines.
Our output must be well sourced, based on sound evidence, thoroughly tested and presented in clear, precise language. We should be honest and open about what we don't know and avoid unfounded speculation. Claims, allegations, material facts and other content that cannot be corroborated should normally be attributed.
We are open in acknowledging mistakes when they are made and encourage a culture of willingness to learn from them.
If an article has been edited since publication to correct a material inaccuracy, a note will be added at the end of the text to signal to the reader there has been an amendment or correction with the date of that change. If there is a small error in a story that does not alter its editorial meaning (eg name misspelling), the correction will be made without an additional note.
Unless content is specifically made available only for a limited time period, there is a presumption that material published online will become part of a permanently accessible archive and will not normally be removed. Exceptional circumstances may include legal reasons, personal safety risks, or a serious breach of editorial standards that cannot be rectified except by removal of the material.
Verification/Fact-checking Standards: The BBC's accuracy and verification policy is outlined in the Editorial Guidelines on Accuracy.
Unnamed Sources: The BBC's policy and guidance on the use of anonymous sources is detailed in the Editorial Guidelines.
Actionable Feedback: The BBC's complaints procedure is outlined in the BBC Complaints Framework.
Leadership: Meet the senior executive team that runs the news division: BBC News Board.
BBC News articles based on original reporting carry bylines (the name of the journalist), as often do those authored by journalists who have a subject specialism.
General news stories, which tend to combine information from a variety of sources, including news agencies, BBC Newsgathering and BBC broadcast output, or which may have been produced by several members of staff over the course of the day, do not as a rule carry bylines.
BBC News distinguishes between factual reporting and opinion. We use machine-readable labels in six categories:
Our output, as appropriate to its subject and nature, should be well sourced, based on sound evidence, thoroughly tested and presented in clear, precise language. We strive to be honest and open about what we don't know and avoid unfounded speculation.
Where BBC News relies on a single source for a key aspect of its coverage, we will strive to credit that source, where possible. We usually link to official reports, sets of statistics and other sources of information, to enable you to judge for yourself the underlying information that we are reporting on.
Whenever appropriate, we also offer links to relevant third-party websites that provide additional information, source material or informed comment.
For in-depth pieces of work, such as complex investigations or data journalism projects, we will help you understand how we went about our work by showing the underlying data and by disclosing any caveats, assumptions or other methodological frameworks used - for example, the study-design; the sample size; representativeness; margins of error; how the data was collected; geographical relevance and time periods.

title: Caadada ku salaysan in la uleeyo dadka lagu helo khaladaad ka baxsan dhaqamada bulshada
text:
Dhaqan ahaan, edbinta iyo tarbiyeynta caruurta gabar ama wiil waxaa masuul ka ah aabbaha iyo hooyada reerka, waa in ay waaniyaan oo wax u sheegaan inta ay awoodaan, haddii arrintu ka baxdo gacantooda, waxa ay u gudubtaa beesha, dhaqanka noocaan ah waxaa loo yaqaan "'Friend's room", waxaana caado u leh qabiilka Guji oo kamid qabiillada Itoobiya.
Mudane Magarsa Baddacha waa oday ka tirsan degmadda Adoola Woyyu. Sida uu sheegay, waa hab-dhaqameed ay beesha ku ciqaabto qofka dembi sameeya.
"Aabbaha iyo hooyadu waa ay waaninaayaan wiilkooda ama gabadhooda, way edbinayaan, si habboonna way u barbaariyaan. Haddii ilmuhu ka baxo awooddooda ama uu diido talada, kuna kaco falal xad-dhaaf ah, markaas ciqaabtu waxay noqotaa mid beeleed," ayuu yiri.
Ka hor inta aan la ciqaabin, odayaasha beeshu waxa ay mar ama laba mar u yeeraan qofka khaladka galay, haddii uu sii wado inuu sameeyo waxii lagala hadlay, waxa la yiraahdaa 'Friend's room ayaa la galinayaa, waxaana lagu garaacaa ul (harcumme).
"Beeshu laba ama saddex jeer ayay ilmaha la fariisataa oo la waaniyaa, balse haddii uu diio talada. Markaas aabbaha, adeerka, walaalaha iyo qabiilka ayaa wada baxa, dhammaanna dhabarka ayay ul kaga garaacaan," ayuu yiri.
Dhaqan ahaan, qofka la ciqaabayo xitaa haddii lagu qabto goobta, kabaha iyo dharka ayaa laga bixiyaa, ul ayaana lala dhacaa.
Boru Meshii, oo ku dhashay kuna barbaaray degmadda Malka Soodda ee Galbeedka Guji, ayaa ka sheekeeya ciqaabta uu kala kulmay qolka ciqaabta xilligii caruurnimada.
"Tani waa habka uu Guji ku hago kuna barbaariyo wiilkiisa. Wiilku waa sida aabbaha; haddii uu ka baxo xeerka aabbaha, wuxuu u gudbaa qabiilka."
Warbixinada qotada dheer iyo wararka BBC Somali oo toos kuugu imanaaya WhatsApp.
"Tani waa qaab dhaqan qofka reer Guji uu barbaariyo kuna hago wiilkiisa, waiilku waa inuu ahaadaa sida aabaha, haddii uu ka gudbo xeerka aabaha waxaa uu u gudbayaa qabiilka".
Boru, markii uu ahaa dugsiga hoose ayuu dambi galay kadib markii uu ka cararay iskuulka waxa uuna maray ciqaabtiisii.
"Waxaan ka baxay fasalka lixaad, waxaana aaday wabiga oo dahab ka raadin jiray aabbahay arrinta u sheegay reerka, waa ay ii yimaadeyn, waxa ayna igu waaniyeen inaan dugsiga ku laabto. Sannad ka dib ayaan mar kale baxay oo halkii ku noqday.
"Markaas ayay beeshii iigu yimaadeyn webigii aan dahabka ka raadinayay, wayna i kaxeeyeen. Waxay yiraahdeen: 'Wiilkan waxaan ku waaninay inuu jidka saxda ah ku laabto, balse waa uu diiday talada oo isla falalkii ayuu ku noqday; sidaas darteed Qolka ciqaabta ayaan geeneynaa".
Boru, oo xusuusanaya in guriga aabbihiis dhabarka ul lagula garaacay, ayaa sheegay in la garaacay ilaa dhabarkiisu uu ka gaduuto oo dhiig u ekaaday.
"Aad ayaan u xanaaqay, maxaa dadkan oo dhan iigu soo wada baxayn? Markii ay garaacista dhammeeyeen,kofee iyo subag ayey dhabarka ii mariyeen, waxa ayna igu waaniyeen inaan dib ugu laabto iskuulka oo aan waxbarashada ku noqdo," ayuu yidhi.
Dhaqankan ayaa marka hore u eg adag oo fogeenaya caruurta, balse waa mid faa'iido badan leh sida uu Boru qabo.
"Falkaa si weyn ayuu ii anfacay, hadda waan fahmay in dadkaasi aysan ii garaacin si ay dhibaateeyaan. Xitaa garaacista ka dib waxay kuu sheegayaan wanaagga, wayna ku waaniyaan."
Isagoo ka duulaya wixii ku dhacay, Boru wuxuu leeyahay dhaqanka Qolka ciqaabta waa mid bulshada ka sifaysa falalka bani-aadanimo ka baxsan, ubadkana dib ugu soo celinaya jidka saxda ah.
Ciqaabta Qolkaan waxa ay ku saleesan tahay qofka qaadan waaya waana waalidka ama sameeya falal anshaxa ka baxsan sida: diidmada talada qoyska iyo qabiilka, xadgudubka waalidiinta, ku takri-falidda xaaska, iyo xirir kalmo lala yeesho qof qaraabada dhaw ah.
Ciqaabtan mararka qaar hal qof ayay ku koobnaan kartaa, halka waqtiyo kanala ay wada maraan dadkii dembiga galay. Si kastaba ha ahaatee, ciqaabtan waxa la fulinayaa marka beesha ay u aragto inay lama huraan tahay.
Habkan edbinta Qolka ciqaabta, qofka ay beesha ku garaacdo ul caleemo leh, ma laha rafcaan ama dacwad xitaa haddii uu dhaawac jidheed soo gaaro, inasta oo Kuwa garaacaya aysan gaarsiineyn dhaawac halis ah, maadaama ujeeddadu tahay wax-barid, sida ay yiraahdeen.
Sida dhaqanka Guji yahay, ilmaha waxaa waaniya, edbiya, kana saxaya aabbaha iyo hooyada. Haddii uu ka sii gudbo, beesha ayaa waanisa; haddii uu haddana ka gudbo, Qolka ciqaabta ayuu marayaa. Qof kasta oo weli sii wada falal bani-aadanimo ka baxsan xitaa ka dib Qolkaas waxa uu mutaystaa ciqaabta ugu dambaysa ee ah ka saarid qabiil.
Dhaqankani waa sharci-darro. Sharciga Itoobiya ma taageero ciqaab jidheed oo loo geysto carruur ama cid kale, laakiin dowladdu, ma cadda waxa ay ka qabanayso joojinta dhaqankan.

title: Maxaad ka taqanaa nuucyada suxuurta ugu caansan Afrika?
text:
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Inta lagu jiro bisha barakeysan ee Ramadan, waxaa kordha rabitaanka cunista cuntooyin kala duwan. Dad badanna waxay tixgeliyaan faa'iidada caafimaad iyo sidoo kale xaaladda cimilada marka ay dooranayaan waxa ay ku afuraan ama ku sahuraan.
Xilli ay qoysasku ka fikirayaan nooca cunto ee ku habboon afurka iyo saxuurta maalmaha bisha soonka, ayaa BBC-du waxa ay la hadashay qaar ka mid ah wariayaasheeda ku sugan dalal kala duwan ee Afrika si aan u ogaanno cuntooyinka inta badan laga cuno dalalkooda marka la gaadho suxuurta iyo afurka bisha Ramadan.
"Marka la gaadho afurka, waxaan ku billownaa timir iyo caano. kaddibna waxaan cunnaa waxa aan ugu yeedhno harira oo ah nooc maraq u eg oo dhadhan fiican leh, sidoo kalena kordhiya tamarta islamarkaana diiriya caloosha," ayay tiri wariyaha BBC-da, Basma El Atti.
Dhanka suxuurta, "badanaa waxaan cunnaa waxa loo yaqaan Sellou — waa cunto laga sameeyo bur iyo laws, waxaana sidoo kale cabnaa biyo badan."
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Axmed Ambali oo ka soo jeeda Nigeria ayaa yidhi:
"Marka la joogo afurka, badanaa waxaan cunnaa cunto fudud. Waxaan cabnaa cabbitaanka la yidhaahdo kunu, waxaana la cunaa kosai iyo alala. Waa cuntooyin fudud maadaama calooshu muddo dheer madhnayd."
Suxuurta ka warran ayaa la weyddiiyay.
"Run ahaantii, suxurta waxaan cunnaa cunto si fiican kuu dherginaysa, sida tuwo iyo cuntooyinka la midka ah."
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
"Marka la joogo xilliga afurka, waxaan cabnaa shaaha kinkeliba oo leh waxyaabo dawo ahaan loo isticmaalo, waxaana la socda timir. Isku darkaas ayaa ka caawiya caloosha iyo mindhicirrada in ay si tartiib ah u shaqo bilaabaan," ayay tiri Khadidiatou Cisse.
Waxay intaas ku dartay: "Dhanka suxuurta, qof walba wax uu jecel yahay ayuu cunaa, laakiin inta badan waxaa la cunaa bariis lagu kariyey noocyo kala duwan oo maraq khudaar ah."
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
"Marka la joogo afurka, waxaan cunnaa saambuuse, bajiye iyo jabbaati ka hor inta aanan cunin cunto culus sida bariis," ayay tiri Nasteexa Maxamed.
Dhanka sxuurta, "badanaa waxaan cunnaa cunto fudud sida shaah, caano fadhi ama gadhoodh iyo jabbaati, iyo cunto kasta oo jidhka ku hayn karta tamar ilaa maalinta oo dhan, xitaa marka ay qorraxdu kulushahay."
Afurka iyo suxuurta ayaa ka mid ah waxyaabaha ay Soomaalidu aad uga dadaasho bisha Rabadaan. Saambuuse, qare ama xabxab ayaa laga maarmaan ah.
"Waxa inta badan muhiim ii ah saambuus, bur , canjeero soomaali iyo noocyada cabbitaanka sida liin macaanta iyo qaxwo Soomaali sonkortu ku yar tahay," ayay tidhi Kawsar Maxamed oo BBC-da ka tirsan.
Meelo badan oo ka mid ah gudaha dalka ama Soomaalida qurbaha waxa caan ka ah in lagu suxuurto dalagyada ay ka mid yihiin sarreenka, soorta, heedda iyo qaar kale.

title: Maxaad ka xusuusataa dadka caanka ah ee geeriyooday 2025
text:
Iyadoo ay fooda inagu soo hayso dhamaadka sanadka 2025-ka, aynu dib u jaleecno dad caanka ah ee sanadkan geeriyooday dunida, kuwaas oo si weyn uga dhex muuqday xirfadahooda.
Dadkaas ayaa isugu jira siyaasiyiin, saynisyahanno, cayaartoy, fanaaniin iyo qaar kale.
ololeeye dhanka siyaasida ah ee muxaafidka u ahaa dowladda Donald Trump ee da'da yarka ahaa ayaa si cad loo dilay bishii Sebtembar.
Markii uu madaxweyne ka ahaa Nigeria, Buhari ayaa hogaaminayay dalka ugu dadka badan Afrika 2015 ilaa 2023. Mudadii uu xilka hayay waxaa hareeyay hoos u dhac dhaqaale oo Nigeria ku yimid, weerarrada ay mintidiintu ku qaadeen ceelasha saliidda, iyo isbitaallada oo soo noqnoqday ayaa lagu xasuustaa. Waxaa ku dhacay xanuun aan la shaacin.
Fadlan halkan riix oo ku soo biir janalka WhatsApp ee BBC Somali si aad u hesho wararkii ugu dambeeyey ee caalamka, iyo kuwa gobolka
Ololeeye caalami ah, oo jacayl qoto dheer u qabay xayawaanada ilaalinta deegaankana ka dhigay qayb ka mid ah noloshiisa, wuxuu dhintay Oktoobar.
Feeryahankii calanka u hayay feerka culus ayaa lumiyay jagadaas kadib markii ay is wajaheen Muhammad Ali dagaalkoodii caanka ahaa ee 1974 ee Kinshasa - "The Rumble in the Jungle."
Qoraa Kenyan ah oo dhaleeceyntii uu u jeediyay dowladda xorriyadda ka dib keentay in xabsiga loo taxaabo, lana tarxiilo.
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Baadarigii ugu horreeyay ee ka soo jeeda Koonfurta Ameerika, Pope Francis ayaa dhintay 21-kii Abriil, 2025, isagoo 88 jir ah, gurigiisa oo ku yaal magaalada Vatican-ka, ka dib markii uu in muddo ah xanuunsanayay, ka dib markii uu istaroog ku dhacay.
In ka badan 250,000 oo qof ayaa ka qayb galay aaskiisa bishii April, sida ay sheegtay Vatican-ka.

title: Tobanka lacagood ee ugu qiimaha liita adduunka sannadkan 2026
text:
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Doollarka Mareykanku waa lacagta ugu badan ee adduunka wax lagu kala iibsado, inkasta oo aysan ahayn lacagta ugu qiimaha badan adduunka (lacagta qiimaha sare leh hadda waa Diinaarka Kuweyt).
Laakiin dhinaca kale, lacagaha ugu qiimaha liita adduunka ayaa ah qiimo aad u hooseeya marka loo eego doolarka Mareykanka.
Sida lagu sheegay joornaalka Forbes, qaar ka mid ah lacagahaasi waxay u dhigmaan kumannaan kun si loogu sarrifo hal doollar.
Lacagta pound-ka ee Lubnaan ayaa ka mid ah lacagaha ugu liita adduunka marka loo eego doolarka Mareykanka. Hal pound oo lacagtaas ah waxa lagu sarrifaa $0.000011. Si kale haddii loo dhigo, $1 wuxuu u dhigmaa 89,556.36 lacagta Lubnaan.
Lubnaan waxay xuduud la leedahay Badda Mediterranean-ka, waxayna deris la tahay Israel iyo Suuriya oo ku yaalla Bariga Dhexe. Dalkaasi wuxuu dhaqaale ahaan ku tiirsan yahay adeeg-bixinta, sidoo kalena wuxuu dhoofiyaa dahab, bir, kiimikooyin, cunto iyo cabitaanno.
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Sida lagu sheegay warbixin ay daabacday Forbes, halka riyaal ee Iran ah wuxuu hadda qiimo ahaan u dhigmaa $0.000024, taasi oo micnaheedu yahay in $1 lagu sarrifi karo 42,112.50 rial oo Iiraan ah.
Riyaalka Iiraan waxaa markii ugu horreysay la aasaasay dhammaadkii 1700-kii. Lacagtan ayaa muddo sannado ah ku jirtay heerkaas marka loo eego doolarka Mareykanka.
Iran waxay ku taallaa Gacanka Faaris ee u dhexeeya Ciraaq iyo Afghanistan. Waxay ka mid tahay dalalka ugu waaweyn ee dhoofiya saliidda iyo gaaska dabiiciga ah, laakiin cunaqabataynta dhaqaale ayaa cadaadis xooggan ku keentay.
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Sida lagu sheegay Forbes, Dong-ga Vietnam waxuu ku jiraa kaalinta saddexaad ee liiska lacagaha ugu liita adduunka, halkii xabbo waxa lagu iibsadaa $0.000038. Taas macnaheedu waa in $1 uu u dhigmo 26,345 dong oo Vietnam ah.
Vietnam waxay xuduud la leedahay Badda Koonfureed ee Shiinaha, waxayna deris la tahay Shiinaha, Laos, iyo Cambodia. Adeegyada ayaa kaalin weyn ka ciyaara dhaqaalaha dalka, waxaana soo raaca warshadaha sida korontada, tamarta, iyo dharka.
Lacagta dalkan ayaa cadaadis kala kulmaysa cunaqabataynta dhoofinta iyo hoos u dhaca dhoofka, iyo sidoo kale kororka joogtada ah ee heerarka dulsaarka ee Mareykanka.
Laotian Kip, ama Lao Kip, waxaa la aasaasay sanadihii 1950-meeyadii, waxaana lagu qiimeeyaa in ay tahay lacagta afraad ee ugu liidata qiime ahaan adduunka iyadoo hal kip uu u dhigmo $0.000046. Taas macnaheedu waa in $1 uu u dhigma 21,663.26 kip.
Laos waa dal aan lahayn bad, wuxuuna xuduud la leeyahay Vietnam, Thailand, Cambodia, iyo Shiinaha. Dalkaasi wuxuu si weyn ugu tiirsan yahay dhoofinta, sida naxaasta, dahabka, iyo alwaaxda.
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Lacagta qaranka ee Indonesia waxaa la aasaasay sanadkii 1946. Hal rupiah hadda waxay qiimo ahaan u dhigantaa $0.000059, taasoo micnaheedu yahay in $1 uu u dhigmo 16,849.37 rupiah.
Indonesia waxay ka kooban tahay in ka badan 17,000 jasiiradood oo ku yaalla Badweynta Baasifigga, oo ay ku jiraan Java, Sumatra, iyo qaybo ka mid ah Borneo iyo New Guinea.
Marka la eego wax-soo-saarka guud ee dalka (GDP), Indonesia waa dalka ugu weyn Koonfur-bari Aasiya, gaar ahaan sababtoo ah qaybta adeegyada.
Indonesia sidoo kale waxay hodan ku tahay kheyraadka dabiiciga ah, hase yeeshee lacagteeda qaranka ayaa hoos u dhacay marka loo eego lacagaha kale, sababtuna waa sicir-bararka iyo hoos u dhaca dhaqaalaha.
Som ayaa la aasaasay sannadkii 1993, waxaana halkii som oo lacagta qaranka ee Uzbekistan uu hadda u dhigmaa $0.00008. Si kale haddii loo dhigo, $1 wuxuu u dhigmaa 11,861.84 som.
Uzbekistan waa dal ku yaalla bartamaha Aasiya, wuxuuna ka mid ahaa jamhuuriyadii hore ee Midowgii Soofiyeeti. Waa mid ka mid ah dalalka ugu waaweyn ee dhoofiya suufka adduunka, sidoo kalena wuxuu leeyahay kayd weyn oo macdan, saliid iyo gaas ah.
Sida lagu sheegay Forbes, dalkaasi wuxuu sameeyay isbeddelo dhaqaale, hase yeeshee weli wuxuu la tacaalayaa koror hooseeya oodhinaca dhaqaalaha ah, sicir barar xooggan, shaqo la'aan iyo musuqmaasuq.
Faranka Guinea waxaa la sameeyay sannadkii 1959-kii, waxaana hal faran oo Guinea ah qiimo ahaan uu u dhigmaa $0.000115. Taas macnaheedu waa in $1 uu u dhigmo 8,658.25 faran oo Guinea ah.
Guinea oo uu Faransiisku gumaystay waxay ku taallaa Galbeedka Afrika, gobolka la yidhaahdo Saaxil (Sahara). Waxay hodan ku tahay kheyraad dabiici ah sida dahabka iyo dheemmanta, laakiin waxay la tacaalaysaa sicir-barar sarreeya, qalalaase millitari, iyo qulqulka qaxootiga ka imanaya dalalka deriska ah sida Liberia iyo Sierra Leone.
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Jamhuuriyadda Burundi waa dal aan lahayn bad oo ku yaalla Bariga Afrika. Hal faran oo Burundi ah ayaa hadda qiimo ahaan u dhigma $0.00011, taasoo micnaheedu yahay in hal doollar ($1) uu u dhigmo 8,754.96 faran oo Burundi ah.
Dalka waxaa ku nool in ka badan 14 milyan oo qof, wuxuuna xuduud la leeyahay Rwanda dhinaca waqooyi, Tanzania dhinaca bari/koofur-bari, iyo Jamhuuriyadda Dimuqraadiga ah ee Congo dhinaca galbeed.
Sida Forbes sheegtay, Ariary-ga ayaa la sameeyay sannadkii 1961-kii, waxaana si rasmi ah u bedelay faranka Madagascar sannadkii 2005-tii. Hal ariary ayaa hadda qiimo ahaan u dhigma $0.00021, taasoo ka dhigan in hal doollar ($1) uu u dhigmo 4,637.73 ariary.
Madagascar waa jasiirad ku taalla xeebta koonfur-bari ee Afrika. Beeraha, macdanta, kalluumeysiga iyo kaymaha ayaa ah qaybaha ugu waaweyn ee dhaqaalaha dalka. Dhoofinta dalka waxaa ka mid ah birta.
Guarani-ga Paraguay waxaa markii ugu horreysay la aasaasay sannadkii 1952. Hal guarani hadda wuxuu qiimo ahaan u dhigmaa $0.00015, taasoo micnaheedu yahay in $1 uu u dhigmo 6,619.11 guarani.
Paraguay waa dal aan lahayn bad, wuxuuna xuduud la leeyahay Brazil, Argentina, iyo Bolivia. Dalka ayaa hormuud u ah soo saarista sonkorta, hilibka lo'da, iyo galleyda.
Lacagta Paraguay ayaa ku jirtay cadaadis sababtuna tahay sicir-barar, musuqmaasuq, iyo lacagaha faalsada ama been abuurka ah.

title: 'Ma ahi Muslim laakiin waxaan soomaa bisha Ramadaan'
text:
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Dad badan ayaa sooma bisha Rabadaan iyaga oo gudanaya waajib diini ah oo saaran ama waxay rajeynayaan in ay ajar ka helaan.
Sidoo kale waxa jira qaar kale oo sooma sannad kasta si ay ugu dhowaadaan Rabbigooda.
Hase yeeshee, qaar ayaa u sooma sababo kale dartood, sida in ay xishoonayaan dad kale ama in ay ka baqayaan in ay wax ku cunaan goob dadweyne.
Laakiin dad badan oo Muslimiin ah, soonku waa arrin aad u muhiimsan diin ahaan; waana cibaado qarsoon oo ay u sameeyaan si ay ugu dhowaadaan Rabbigooda.
Laakiin maxaa sababa in dadka aan diintan rumaysnayn ama aan baran Islaamku ay sannad kasta u soomaan Ramadaanka?
Dalalka Carbeed qaarkood, dadkaas waxaa loogu yeeraa "Cibaadeystayaasha Ramadaanka", taasoo loola jeedo kuwa aan cibaado samayn sannadka oo dhan marka laga reebo bisha Ramadaan.
Qaybta Carabiga ee BBC-da ayaa la xiriirtay haween iyo rag ka kala yimid dalal Carbeed oo kala duwan si ay uga wareysato sababaha ku kallifay inay sidaas sameeyaan.
Waxaan qarinnay diintooda sababo gaar ah awgood, hase yeeshee way oggolaadeen inay hadlaan iyaga oo aan shaacin diimahooda.
Fouad oo ka yimid Lubnaan ayaa noo sheegay in uu u soomo Ramadaanka si uu u raadsado barakada sannadka, sida dadka qaar u arkaan bilowga sannadka cusub.
Wuxuu yiri: "Sida dadka intooda badan ay u sameeyaan go'aanno bilowga sannad kasta si ay u helaan barako iyo horumar, aniguna waxaan u arkaa Ramadaanka fursad aan ku hagaajiyo caafimaadkayga oo aan ku barto dabeecado cusub."
Wuxuu intaas ku daray: "Soonka bil dhan ah wuxuu i siinayaa fursad aan ku barto dabeecado cusub sida samir iyo adkaysi."
Kaddib markii uu dib ugu soo laabtay Lubnaan, Fouad wuu joojiyay soonka.
"Haddii aan halkan ku soomo, waxay u ekaan lahayd munaafaqnimo, sidii in aan dadka igu dhow tusayo inaanan diinta beddelin. Waxay u ekaan lahayd i naan ka qarinayo xaqiiqda caqiidadayda, aniguna taas ma doonayo."
Xigashada Sawirka, Khaled DESOUKI / AFP
Ma aha Fouad oo keliya, dad badan oo kale ayaa soonku wuxuu ula muuqdaa dhaqan iyo hidde soo jireen ah.
Basma, oo asal ahaan ka soo jeedda Tuniisiya kuna nool Yurub, waxay bilowdaa diyaarinta Ramadaanka toddobaadyo ka hor inta aanay bishu bilan, inkastoo aysan raacin diin gaar ah, isla markaana aysan samayn wax cibaado ah sannadka oo dhan.
Xigashada Sawirka, Yassine Gaidi/Anadolu Agency
Helidda xasilloonida nafeed waa mid ka mid ah sababaha ay Ragheda oo ka soo jeeda Lubnaan u soonto Ramadaanka.
Waxay tiri, "Soonku wuxuu ka caawiyaa helitaanka xasillooni gudaha ah iyo xoojinta awoodda maskaxda. Wuxuu qofka siinayaa fursad uu ku helo daganaansho maskaxeed isaga oo ka xakameynaya fikirka ku saabsan cuntada islamarkaana ka fogaada meelaha buuqa leh."
Intii ay dhalinyarada ahayd iyo qaangaarnimadeedaba, Ragheda waxay ahayd qof si weyn diinta u raaca, laakiin goor dambe ayay ka tagtay dhammaan cibaadada diimeed. Si kastaba ha ahaatee, waxay sii wadatay soonka sababta oo ah waxay u aragtay "mid ay faa'iido ka helayso."
Xigashada Sawirka, Saqib Majeed/SOPA
Warbixinada qotada dheer iyo wararka BBC Somali oo toos kuugu imanaaya WhatsApp.
Nin kale oo ka soo jeeda Lubnaan ayaa isna waxa uu u soomaa sidii uu naftiisa u bari lahaa samir iyo dulqaad.
Isagu isku ma arko in uu raaco diin gaar ah, wuxuuna yiri, "Markii aan noolaa xilligii Mu'tazila oo aanan raacin wax diimeed oo iga horjoogsan lahaa in aan fahmo caqiidadooda, waxaan u arkaa soonka fursad aan naftayda ugu tababaro dulqaadka, samirka, iyo xusuusinta dadka kale."
Dhanka kale, Iimaan oo ka soo jeedda Masar ayaa sheegtay in ay u soonto si ay xidhiidhka Alle u xoojiso. Iman waxay horay u billaabi jirtay soonka sunnaha ah ka hor inta aysan bilaabin Ramadaanka, hase yeeshee mararka qaar waxay u joojisaa sababo la xiriira caafimaad darro.
Iman waxay la nooshahay xaalad caafimaad oo culus oo ka dhigta in ay dareento inay lumisay qayb ka mid ah xubinteeda jirka, sidaas darteed soonku wuxuu u noqdaa hab ay ku dareento raaxo iyo yareynta dhibaatada.
Inkastoo aysan raacin barashada Islaamka, Iman waxay sheegtay inay ku raaxaysato soonka sababtoo ah wuxuu ka caawiyaa inay nafteeda ku barato dulqaad iyo samir.

title: Nidaamka Sir dhowrka
text:
BBC waxaa ka go'an ilaalinta xogtaada gaarka ah iyo tan qoyskaagaba marka aad isticmaalaysaan adeegyada BBC. Si aad u hesho adeegyada kala duwan ee BBC oo buuxa, waxaa mararka qaar loo baahan yahay in la uruuriyo wararkaaga.
Mar walba oo aad soo gudbiso wararkaas, waxaa sharcigu na farayaa in warkaaga aan u adeegsanno si waafaqsan dhamaan sharciyada UK ee ku saabsan ilaalinta wararka gaarka ah, kuwaas oo uu ku jiro sharciga ilaalinta xogta ee soo baxay 1998.
Boggaga internetka waxay wataan tilmaamo kugu sii xirayo boggag kale oo qayb sadexaad ah. BBC mas'uul kama aha waxa ku qoran boggaga aan BBC ahayn, isticmaalkaaga boggagaas qatarta ka iman karta mas'uul kama ihin.
Marka aad gasho si aad uga qaybqaadato ama si aad u hesho mid ka mid ah adeegyada boggaga kale BBC sida wargaysyada, tartamada, wada sheekaysiga tooska ah iyo guddiyada fariimaha, waxaa dhici karta in aad ku waydiinno warar gaar ah oo kugu saabsan. Waxaa ku jira kara magacaaga, cinwaanka emailkaaga, cinwaankaaga boostada, telephone ama telefoonka gacanta ama taariikhda dhalashada.
Hadii aad galiso faahfaahintaas meelaha lagaa dalbo, waxaad BBC u ogolaanaysaa iyo adeegyadeeda cidda gudbisa in ay kuu soo gudbiyaan adeegyada aad doorato.
BBC waxay kaloo adeegsataa aqbaar kaydiyayaasha (Cookies). Cookie waa qayb yar oo kaydisa wararka ku soo saabsan xulashadaada boggaga, ogolaanaysana in boggaga ay u qaabayso si ku haboon danayntada. Waad ku hagaajin kartaa internet-kaagu in uu aqbalo dhamaan aqbaar kaydiyayaasha, si aad ugu wargaliso marka aqbaar kaydiye la samaynayo ama in aadan heli wax aqbaar kaydiye ah (Cookies).
Si la mid ah, waxaan uruurinaa cinwaanada IP (Cinwaanka IP waa nambar si gaar ah loogu garan karo computer kasta ama qalab kale ee internet-ka loo adeegsado. Waxaan adeegsanaa barnaamijka lafaguridda si uu u eego cinwaanada IP iyo aqbaar kaydiyayaasha, iyadoo ujeedadu tahay in la horumariyo khibradaada adeegsiga. Waxaa kaloo aan u isticmaalaynaa cinwaanka IP si aan u go'aansanno in aad ka soo galayso adeegyada BBC meel gudaha ama dibedda UK ah.
Hadii aad da' ahaan jirto 16 ama ka yar, fadlan soo hel fasaxa waalidkaa ama qofka mas'uulka kaa ah ka hor inta mar walba oo aad wararkaaga gaarka ah galinayso boggaga BBC. Adeegsadayaasha aan haysan ogolaanshaha looma ogolaan doono in ay gudbiyaan warkooda shaqsiga ah.
Sidee BBC u adeegsan doontaa wararka ay kaa uruuriso? BBC oo kaliya waxay isticmaali doontaa aqbaarta gaarka ah sababo dhowr ah awgood oo ay ku jiraan "ujeeddo dhinaca maamulidda adeega ah" taasoo macnuhu yahay in BBC ay dhici karto in ay kula soo xiriirto arrimo ku saabsan adeeg aad ku biirtay.
Waxaa aqbaartaada ay mar walba ahaanaysaa mid qarsoodi ah inta aan ka ahayn meelaha loo baahan yahay in aan la qarin ama sharcigu ogol yahay. Hadii aad galiso ama dirto aflagaado, wax aan haboonayn ama wax aan la ogolayn meel ka mid ah ama bbc.co.uk, BBC waxaa dhici karta in ay aqbaarta gaarka ah ee ay kaa hayso ay u adeegsato in ay joojiso dhaqamadaas oo kale.
Ilaa intee ayay BBC kaydinaysaa wararkaaga? Waxaan haynaynaa aqbaarta kuu goonida ah oo ku jiraya system ilaa iyo inta ay lagama maarmaan u noqoto adeega ay isticmaashay. Meelaha aad wax ku biiriso bogga BBC, waxaa dhici karta sheekadaada sida guud in oo kaliya la hayo intii macquul ee loogu baahan yahay oo la xiriira sababaha markii horeba aad u soo gudbisay. Si aad u hesho aqbaar buuxda oo waqtiga la socota kuna saabsan siyaasadaha Sir dhowridda BBC, fadlan hubi bogga guud ee English-ka: http://www.bbc.co.uk/privacy

title: Maxay tahay magaalada Elon Musk ee 'iskeed isku maamusha', taas oo uu qorsheynayo in uu ka dhiso dayaxa?
text:
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
'Magaalo iskeed isku maamusho oo dayaxa laga dul dhiso ayaa la filayaa in muddo ka yar 10 sano laga sameeyo sida uu sheegay Elon Musk.
Madaxa shirkadaha X, Tesla iyo SpaceX, isla markaana ah qofka ugu taajirsan dunida ayaa qoraal uu ku daabacay bartiisa X oo la aqriyay in ka badan 40 milyan oo jeer ku sheegay in SpaceX ay diiradda saartay in ay dayaxa dushiisa magaalo ka dhisto halkii markii hore qorshahu ahaa in ay ka dhisto xidigga Mars.
Laakiin maxaa keenay in Musk beddelo fikirkiisa? Maxaase laga ogyahay magaaladan "iskeed isku maamuleysa" ee laga dhisayo dayaxa?
Ma jiro weli qorshe rasmi ah oo faahfaahsan oo leh naqshado dhisme oo dhammaystiran oo ku saabsan magaaladan, balse waa aragti uu Musk dadka kula wadaagay bartiisa X.
Wuxuu sheegay in la dhisi doono deegaan si tartiib tartiib ah u ballaaran kara iyadoo la adeegsanayo khayraadka dayaxa.
Qoraalkiisa ayuu Musk ku sheegay in tani lagu gaari karo "wax ka yar 10 sano, halka Mars ay qaadaneyso 20 sano ama wax ka badan".
Musk wuxuu sheegay in safar loo aadi karo oo kaliya Mars marka "meerayaashu is-waafaqaan 26-kii biloodba mar.
"Tani waxay ka dhigan tahay in aan si ka dhakhso badan ku dhameyn karno dhismaha magaalo laga sameeyo dayaxa marka loo eego magaalo laga dhiso Mars ah."
Si kastaba ha ahaatee, SpaceX wuxuu weli hiigsanaysaa dhisidda magaalo ku taalla Mars, wuxuuna ku qoray X in ay "bilaabi doonaan arrintaas shan ilaa toddoba sano gudahood".
Taageerayaasha Musk ayaa si degdeg ah u sameeyey una wadaagay sawirro iyo naqshado muujinaya sida ay u ekaan karto magaalo dayaxa ku taal, qaarna waxay adeegsadeen AI in ay ku sameeyaan magaalada laga dhisayo dayaxa.
Isbeddelkan wuxuu ka duwan yahay qorshihii Musk ee Mars. Sanadkii hore ayuu sheegay in shirkaddu qorshaynayso in ay dirto dayaxgacmeed tagaya Mars ah oo aan dad wadin dhammaadka sanadkan 2026.
Warbixinada qotada dheer iyo wararka BBC Somali oo toos kuugu imanaaya WhatsApp.
Dr Sungwoo Lim, oo bare sare ka ah jaamacad ku taal UK kuna takhasusay adeegsiga iyo sahaminta hawada sare, ayaa ku tilmaamay qorshaha SpaceX ee deegaan looga sameynayo dayaxa mid "la rajeyn karo", oo aan ahayn "khayaali".
"Fikradda aasaasiga ah waxay tahay isticmaalka ciidda dayaxa si loo soo saaro oksijiin, biyo iyo qalab dhisme, taasna waxaa lagu gaari karaa habab warshadeedka ee aynu hore ugu adeegsanay dhulka. Aragti ahaan waa suurtagal," ayuu yiri Dr Sungwoo Lim.
Caqabadda ayuu sheegay in ay tahay sidii loo hubin lahaa nidaamyadaasi in ay si kalsooni leh uga shaqayn karaan jawiga adag ee dayaxa sida heerkul aadka u daran, cufis-jiid hooseeya iyo tamarta xaddidan.
Haddii nidaamka gantaalladeeda cusub ee dira dayaxgacmedka uu u shaqeeyo sidii la qorsheeyey, waxay si joogto ah oo jaban qalab ugu diri karaan dayaxa, taas oo dedejin karta horumarka.
Dr Ugur Guven, oo ah agaasimaha Xarunta Daraasaadka Hawada Sare iyo Tamarta ee jaamacad ku taal Hindiya, ayaa sheegay in Dayaxu leeyahay faa'iido weyn marka la eego deegaameynta dadka, sahay degdeg ah iyo gurmad fudud.
"Haddii wax qaldamaan, si fudud ayaad u diri kartaa hawlgal kale isla markiiba," ayuu yiri, isaga oo xusay in safarka dhulka ilaa dayaxa uu qaato laba ilaa saddex maalmood.
Si kastaba ha ahaate, Dr Lim wuxuu sheegay in "magaalo laga dhiso dayax oo isku filan" in ay weli tahay wax la rajeeyo mustaqbalka.
Dr Lim wuxuu rumaysan yahay in ay "macquul tahay" in saldhig yar oo dayaxa ku yaalla uu 10 sano gudahood bilaabi karo soo saaridda oksijiin u gaar ah, iyo biyo. "Taasi waxay noqoneysaa horumar weyn," ayuu yiri.
Khabiir hore uga tirsanaa NASA ayaa isna sheegay in hadda la maareyn karo sahayda saldhig dayaxa ku yaal haddii shirkadaha sida SpaceX iyo Blue Origin ay si guul leh u horumariyaan gaadiidka ku dega dayaxa.
Si kastaba ha ahaatee, waayo-aragnimada laga helayo dhisidda deegaan laga sameeyo dayax oo waara ayaa mustaqbalka loo adeegsan karaa saldhig laga sameeyo Mars.
Hadallada Musk waxay imanayaan xilli Maraykanku wajahayo tartan sii kordhaya oo kaga imanaya Shiinaha si bani'aadamka u dego dayaxa tobanka sano ee soo socda. Qofna cag ma saarin dusha dayaxa tan iyo hawlgalkii Apollo ee NASA sanadkii 1972.
Musk ayaa dhawaan sheegay in SpaceX uu la wareegay shirkad AI ah oo uu isagu hoggaamiyo.
Musk oo ah saamileyda ugu weyn ee SpaceX ayaa dib u habayn ku samaynaya ganacsiyadiisa isaga oo isu diyaarinaya suurtagalnimada in SpaceX lagu daro suuqa saamiyada. Marka lagu daro liiska suuqa saamiyada waxa uu helayaa ilaa $50 bilyan.
Bishii hore, Musk wuxuu shaaciyey qorshe hawada sare loogu dhisayo hal milyan oo ah xarumo lagu keydiyo xogta si loo daboolo baahida sii kordhaysa ee garaadka macmalka (AI).
Khubarada qaar ayaa ka shakisan arrintan, iyaga oo ka hadlay caqabadda ka dhalan kara qaboojinta qalabka kombayuutarada ee doorka weyn ku leh hawlaha AI-da, maadaama hawada sare aanay lahayn qabowga qalabkaas u baahan yahay.
SpaceX waa qandaraaslaha muhiim u ah NASA, kaas oo u qaabilsan in uu hawada u geeyo cirbixiyeenada kana keeno.

title: Dhegeyso: Rabshadihii maanta ka dhacay gudaha baarlamaanka Federaalka
text:
Rabshado kale ayaa saaka hareeyay kulan ay lahaayeen xildhibaanada labada aqal ee Barlamaanka Soomaaliya, kaasi oo ajandaha looga hadli lahaa uu ahaa in laga doodo soo jeedimaha wax ka badalka dastuurka cutubka afaraad, gaar ahaa soo jeedimaha wax ka badal kooban ee qodobada 94-aad, 50-aad iyo 54-aad.
Xildhibaan ka tirsan barlamaanka Federaalka ayaa sheegtay in la dhawaacay kadib markii uu 'askari ka tirsan ciidamada booliska u gacan qaaday', waa sida ay hadalka u dhigtaye.
Weriyaha BBC-da ee Muqdisho Ibraahim Maxamed Aadan ayaa weydiiyay xildhibaan Cadar Xareed sida ay maanta Barlamaanka wax uga dhaceen, ka dibna warbixintan ayuu ka diyaariyey.

title: Yaa burburiyay saddexdii diyaaradood ee dagaalka Maraykanka, sideese loo burburiyay?
text:
Xigashada Sawirka, US Air Force
Hir cusub oo xiisad daran ah ayaa ka bilaabatay Bariga Dhexe Sabtidii, markii Maraykanka iyo Israa'iil ay ku dhawaaqeen inay weerarro ku qaadeen Iiraan.
Weeraradaas jawaabtooda, Iiraan ma aha oo kaliya inay weerartay Israa'iil, balse sidoo kale waxay gantaallo iyo diyaarado aan duuliye lahayn ku weerartay dhowr ka mid ah xulafada Maraykanka ee Bariga Dhexe.
Sacuudi Carabiya, Imaaraadka Carabta, Kuweet, Baxrayn iyo dalal kale oo gobolka ka tirsan ayaa cambaareynaya weerarrada Iiraan, waxayna uga digayaan Tehraan inay xaq u leeyihiin inay is-difaacaan.
Dalal badan oo ka mid ah kuwaas waxaa ku yaala ama ku sugan saldhigyo milatari ama askar Maraykan ah. Sidaas darteed, Isniintii ayaa warar soo baxay oo sheegaya in saddex diyaaradood oo Maraykan ah lagu burburiyay Kuweet.
Jawiga dagaalka awgiis, dadku waxay u qaateen in diyaaradahaasi lagu burburiyay weerar Iiraan ah, balse arrintu sidaas ma aha. Taliska Dhexe ee Ciidamada Maraykanka (CENTCOM) ayaa xaqiijiyay in saddexdiisa diyaaradood ee F-15E ay ku burbureen Kuweet "shil rasaas saaxiibtinimo" ah (friendly fire).
Faahfaahinta sida ay arrintu u dhacday way iman doontaa, balse marka hore waa muhiim in la ogaado waxa ay Kuwayt ka tiri arrintan.
Wasaaradda Difaaca ee Kuwayt ayaa Isniintii bayaan ku xaqiijisay burburka dhowr diyaaradood oo Maraykan ah.
Warbixinada qotada dheer iyo wararka BBC Somali oo toos kuugu imanaaya WhatsApp.
Bayaankaas ayaa sheegay in shaqaalihii saarnaa diyaaradaha aanay waxyeello soo gaarin, loona gudbiyay isbitaal si baaritaan caafimaad loogu sameeyo. Wasaaraddu waxay intaas ku dartay inay la shaqaynayso xulafadeeda Maraykanka si loo ogaado sababaha keenay burburka diyaaradaha.
Waxaase muuqata in baaritaannada la soo gabagabeeyay, iyadoo CENTCOM ay soo saartay bayaan faahfaahsan.
CENTCOM waxay sheegtay in saddexdeeda diyaaradood ee F-15E Strike Eagle, kuwaas oo ka qayb qaadanayay hawlgal la xiriira howlgalka Cadhadad Darran "Epic Fury" ee Iiraan, ay ku burbureen Kuweet kadib shil rasaas saaxiibtinimo ah.
Bayaanka CENTCOM ayaa lagu sheegay in "intii lagu jiray dagaalka, oo ay ku jireen iska horimaadyo lala galay diyaarado Iiraani ah, gantaallo baalistig ah iyo diyaarado aan duuliye lahayn, nidaamka difaaca cirka ee Kuweet uu si khalad ah u soo riday diyaaradaha Maraykanka."
Sida ay CENTCOM sheegtay, lix ka mid ah shaqaalihii diyaaradaha saarnaa way badbaadeen, xaaladdooduna waa deggan tahay.
CENTCOM waxay sidoo kale uga mahadcelisay ciidamada difaaca Kuweet taageerada ay ka geysteen hawlgallada socda.
Maxay yihiin sifooyinka diyaaradda F-15 Strike Eagle?
Sida ku cad bogga Ciidamada Cirka ee Maraykanka, F-15 Strike Eagle waa diyaarad dagaal oo awood u leh hawlgallo cirka-ka-cirka ah iyo cirka-ka-dhulka ah.
Waxay duuli kartaa joog hoose, waxayna fulin kartaa hawlgallo habeen iyo maalinba, xilli kasta oo cimilo ah. Macluumaadka lagu daabacay bogga Ciidamada Cirka Maraykanka ayaa sidoo kale sheegaya in diyaaraddu awood u leedahay inay beegsato cadowga masaafo dheer, kuna qalabeysan tahay nidaamka raadaarka APG-70 oo awood u leh inuu meel fog ka ogaado bartilmaameedyada dhulka yaalla.

title: Eritrea oo dhoollatuskii milatari ee Itoobiya dhawaan soo bandhigtay ku tilmaantay "daandaansi"
text:
Xigashada Sawirka, Yemane G. Meskel/Twitter
Eritrea ayaa cambaareysey dhoollatus milatari oo dhowaan ay Itoobiya ku qabatay magaalada Hawassa, iyadoo ku tilmaantay "daandaansi."
Dhoollatuska milatari ayaa lagu qabtay munaasabad lagu maamuusayey sannad-guurada 65-aad ee aas-aaska Taliska Hawlgallada Gaarka ah ee Ciidamada Difaaca Itoobiya.
Ra'iisul Wasaaraha Itoobiya Abiy Axmed oo ka hadlayey munaasibadda ayaa sheegay in la dhisay ciidan si gaar ah loo tababaray oo ka difaaci kara gobolka iyo dalalka deriska ah argagixisada.
Wasiirka Warfaafinta Eritrea, Yemane G/Meskel, ayaa dhaleeceeyay dhoollatuska militari iyo hadallada ka soo yeeray Ra'iisul Wasaare Abiy oo uu ku tilmaamay "mid naceyb ku dheehan yahay islamarkaana ka dhan ah madaxbannaanida iyo midnimada dalalka deriska ah".
Yemane oo qoraal ku daabacay bartiisa X, ayaa ku eedeeyay xisbiga talada Itoobiya haya in uu ku hawlan yahay "faragelin iyo xasilooni darro halis ku ah xasilloonida gobolka," xilli sida uu sheegay uu raadinayo taageero dhaqaale oo ka timaadda hay'adda lacagta ee IMF iyo hay'ado kale.
Wasiirka Warfaafinta Eritreeya oo sii hadlaya ayaa intaas ku daray in tillaabadani ka dhigan tahay "bandhig kale oo lagu doonayo dagaal, laguna muujinayo awood dhalanteed ah."
Hadallada Ra'iisul Wasaare Abiy Axmed iyo dhoollatuska milatari labaduba waxay ku soo beegmeen xilli uu sii xumaanayo xiriirka u dhexeeya Itoobiya iyo Eritrea.
Dadka falanqeeya arrimaha gobolka ayaa sheegaya in labada dal ay qarka u saaran yihiin iska-hor-imaad haddii xaaladdu sidan ku sii socoto.
Warbixinada qotada dheer iyo wararka BBC Somali oo toos kuugu imanaaya WhatsApp.
Ra'iisul Wasaare Abiy ayaa sheegay in la tababaray ciidan sida uu sheegay awood u leh ilaalinta amniga goobo ka baxsan xuduudaha dalkiisa, isagoo tixraacaya laba dal oo daris la ah Itoobiya.
"Laga billaabo cirifka Soomaaliya illaa cirifka Massawac, waxaan diyaar u nahay in aan ka taageerno shucuubta walaalaha ah ka-hortagga argagixisada badda iyo in aan hubinno horumar iyo barwaaqo ka hanaqaada gobolka," ayuu yiri.
Massawac waa deked ku taalla Eritrea, waxaana hore saldhig ugu lahaa ciidanka badda Itoobiya, balse Itoobiya way lumisay ka dib madaxbannaanidii Eritrea.
Dhanka kale, heshiis ay billowgii 2024-kii Addis Ababa la gashay Jamhuuriyadda iskeed Madaxbannaanida ugu dhawaaqday Somaliland, si ay u hesho deked ayaa sidoo kale xiisad ka dhex abuuray dalal Soomaaliya iyo Itoobiya.
Iskaashiga sii xoogeysanaya ee u dhexeeya Turkiga iyo Soomaaliya ayaa laftiisa la sheegay in uu jawaab u yahay damaca badeed ee Itoobiya. Wuxuuna Safiirka Itoobiya u fadhiya Soomaaliya oo BBC-du wax ka weydiisay halkka uu ku dambeeyey doonistii dakadeed ee Itoobiya uu sheegay in illaa hadda wax natiijo ah la gaarin.
Ra'iisul Wasaare Abiy Axmed ayaa sheegay in marin badeed la'aantu wiiqeyso horumarka Itoobiya ku taameyso, islamarkaana helitaanka marin badeed uu damaanad u yahay amniga Itoobiya iyo kan gobolka. Laakiin dadka wax falanqeeya ayaa qaba in damacan uu dalalka qaar ula muuqdo "dhul ballaarsi."
Ra'iisul Wasaaraha ayaa fariin uu ku qoray af-Carabi ugu diray hambalyo bisha Ramadaan, isagoo sheegay: "Itoobiya maanta waxay ku hawlan tahay sidii ay saboolnimada uga saari lahayd in ka badan 130 milyan oo qof."
Itoobiya ayaa noqotay dal aan lahayn deked ka dib madaxbannaanidii Eritrea ee sannadkii 1993. Laakiin Maamulka Abiy ayaa dhawaanahan aad u danaynayey sidii ay dib ugu heli lahaayeen dekedda Casab ee Eritrea, taas oo horay halbowle ugu ahayd wax dhoofinta Itoobiya.
Ra'isul Wasaare Abiy ayaa marar badan ku dooday in dekedda Casab ay markii horeba gacanta Itoobiya ay uga baxday si khalad ah, islamarkaana ay dekeddaas xaq u leeyihiin "taariikh ahaan iyo sharci ahaanba". Sheegashadaasina waxay ka careysiisay Eritrea oo u aragta faragelin ku aadden madaxbannaanideeda.
Si kastaba ha ahaatee hadalka dhawaan ka soo yeeray Ra'iisul Wasaare Abiy ee ku aadden in ay sugayaan Afrika oo dhan, iyo dib u dhiska ciidan badda oo horay loo kala diray, ayaa dalalka dariska la ah Itoobiya ula muuqda mid welwelkiisa leh.

title: Dhegeyso: Tirada dadka u dhimanaya abaarta ka jirta Soomaaliya oo sii kordheysa
text:
Xaaladda abaarta ee Soomaaliya ayaa maraysa heer aad u daran iyadoo wararka soo baxaya ay sheegayaan in ay kordhayso tirada dadka u dhintay mushaakilka ay abaartu keentay.
Wararkii ugu dambeeyey ayaa sheegaya in kiisas dhimasho ah laga soo sheegay deegaannada Jubbaland.
Ila hadda waxaa la xaqiijiyey in dad gaaraya 10 ay ku dhinteen deegaannada Jubbaland sida ay BBC u xaqiijiyeen maamulka Jubbaland, ayadoo shalayna kiis geeri ah laga soo sheegay gobolka Mudug.
Wasiirka arrimaha Bini'aadantimada iyo maaraynta Musiibooyinka ee Jubaland Cabdiraxmaan Maxamed Dhiriq ayaa khadka taleefanka ugu warramay Cabdishukri Haybe isaga oo sheegay in ay deegaannadaas qarka u saaran yihiin in looga dhawaaqo macaluul.

title: Shuruudaha adeegsiga
text:
Gelista iyo isticmaalka 'bbc.co.uk' ee UK gudaheeda iyo dibeddaba waxaa bixiya BBC (Dadka dibedda ka isticmaala waxaa laga yaabaa inay arkaan xayeysiin bogagga qaarkood oo ay sameysay qeybta ganacsiga ee BBC, BBC Worldwide Limited ("BBC") shuruudaha hoos soo socda:
1. Haddii aad isticmaaleyso bbc.co.uk waxaad oggolaatay shuruudahan, kuwaasi oo markiiba dhaqan gelaya isla marka aad isticmaasho bbc.co.uk. Haddii aadan oggoleyn dhamaan shuruudaha fadlan ha gelin, hana isticmaalin, waxna ha ku soo biirin bbc.co.uk.
2. BBC waxay beddeli kartaa shuruudahan xilli kadib, sidaa darteed waa inaad iska hubisaa shuruudaha si joogto ah. Isticmaalkaada sii socda ee bbc.co.uk waxa uu ka dhigan yahay inaad aqbashay shuruudaha wax laga beddelay ama lagu kordhiyay. Haddii aadan oggoleyn isbeddelkaasi, waa inaad joojisaa isticmaalka website-ka. Haddii ay jiraan wax iska hor imanaya oo ah shuruudahan iyo kuwo gaar ah oo deegaanka ah oo ka muuqanaya meel kale oo bbc.co.uk ah (oo ay ku jirto sharci meel u gaar ah) markaa waxa jiraya midka danbe.
Wixii faahfaahin dheeraad ah oo ku saabsan isticmaalka bbc.co.uk, hantida maskaxeed, waxa lagu biiriyo BBC, shuruucda bulshada, iska fogeynta iyo xadeynta waajibaadka, isticmaalka guud ee macluumaadka, waxaad gashaa www.bbc.co.uk/terms (oo Af-ingiriis ah)

title: Ramadan 2026: Maxaa ku dhacaya jirkaaga marka aad saacado badan soonto 30 maalmood?
text:
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Sanad walba, malaayiin Muslimiin ah ayaa sooma laga soo bilaabo qorrax soo baxa ilaa qorrax dhaca muddo 30 maalmood ah.
Waxaa kala duwan saacadaha soonka ee dalalka dunida. Dalalka qaar sida Norway, dadku waxay soomaan ilaa 20 saacadood, halka dalalka qaarna saacado intaa aad uga yar laga soomo.
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Waxaan eegeynaa waxa ku dhacaya jirkaaga muddada 30-ka maalmood ah ee aad sooman tahay.
Xaqiiqda ayaa ah in jirku uusan si toos ah ula qabsan soonka maalmaha hore. Jirka ayaa nafaqada ka qaata cuntadii ugu dambeysay ee aad cuntay.
Wax yar kaddibna wuxuu isticmaalaa sokorta beerka ku keydsan si uu tamar uga helo. Marka sokortu idlaato waxyaabaha kale ee uu jirku tamarta ka helo ayaa ah dufanta.
Maalmaha ugu adag waa maalinta koowaad ilaa saddexaad.
Marka uu jirku bilaabo inuu gubo dufantaas, waxay sidoo kale ka caawineysaa dhimista miisaanka, waxay yareysaa dufanta jirka iyo khatarta ah in qofku ay ku dhacdo sokor. Si kastaba, sokorta jirka oo yar ayaa qofka u sababi karta inuu daciif noqdo. Xilligaas qofku wuxuu dareemataa madax xanuun iyo tabar darri.
Waa marka uu qofku dareemayo gaajo saa'id ah.
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Marka uu jirkaagu la qabsado soonka, dufanta jirka ayaa isu beddesha sokor dhiigga raacda. Marka aadan biyo cabeynin soonka, habeenkii ayaa loo baahan yahay inaad cabto si aad u soo celiso biyaha ka lumay jirkaaga, haddii kale dhibaato ayay kugu noqon kartaa.
Dhammaan cunnooyinka waa inay isu dheellitirnaadaan oo ay ka koobnaadaan carbohydrates iyo dufan. Waa muhiim inaad qaadato cunto nafaqo leh isla markaana aad biyo badan cabto.
Wejiga saddexaa, jirka ayaa la qabsanaya soonka.
Dkt. Razeen Mahroof, oo ka tirsan machadka caafimaadka ee Addenbrook cmbridge ayaa sheegay inay jiraan faa'iidooyin kale oo soonku leeyahay.
"Maalmaha caadiga ah, weaxaan cunnaa cuntooyin bur u badan, tanna waxay jirka ka hor istaagi kartaa inuu si wacan u shaqeeyo."
"Tan waxaa lagu saxaa soonka sababtoo ah wuxuu u oggolaanayaa jirka inuu diiradda saaro shaqooyinka kale.
Sidaas darteed soonka ayaa jirka wuxuu ka helaa faa'iido isagoo is dayactira sidoo kalena ka hortaga oo la dagaallama caabuqyada. "
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Warbixinada qotada dheer iyo wararka BBC Somali oo toos kuugu imanaaya WhatsApp.
Muddada dhexe ee soonka, jirka ayaa la qabsada dhammaanba hannaanka soonka.
Caloosha, beerka, kilyaha iyo maqaarka ayaa mara marxalad ay isaga saaraan sunta iyo khashinka.
Qoysas badan ayaa ku afura cunto aad u badan.
"Caafimaad ahaan, marxaladdan, shaqada xubnaha kala duwan waa inay si buuxda u soo laabato. Maskaxdaadu waxay u baahan tahay tamar adiguna awood badan ayaad yeelan kartaa," ayuu yiri dhaqtarka.
"Jirku nafaqada ma isticmaalo si uu tamar uga helo. Tani waa marka aad gaajo gabax la noqoto oo aad murqaha u adeegsato inaad tamar ka hesho. Xaaladdan ayaa dhacda marka aad muddo dheer soonto sida maalmo ilaa toddobaadyo."
"Maaddaama soonka uu keliya yahay qorrax soo bax ilaa qorrax dhac, waxaa jira fursado badan oo aad ku horumarin karto cuntadaada iyo biyaha si jirku uu tamar u helo. Tallaabadan ayaa badbaado u ah murqaha waxayna sidoo kale gacan ka geysataa dhimista miisaanka."
Waxaanu weydiinnay marka soonku wuxuu muhiim u yahay caafimaadka?
Dr Mahroof ayaa yiri haa balse shuruud ayaa ku xiran.
"Soonku wuu u fiican yahay caafimaadka sababtoo ah wuxuu naga caawiyaa inaan diiradda saarno waxaan cuni lahayn iyo xilliga. Si kastaba, iyadoo muddada soonka ee bisha ay fiican tahay, haddana laguma taliyo in intaas laga dheereeyo."
"In la soomo wax ka badan 30 maalmood si joogto ah ma fiicna sababtoo ah muddo dheer ayaad lumineysaa miisaan jirkaaguna wuxuu bilaabayaa inuu joojiyo inuu dufanta u beddelo tamar, wuxuuna u beddelayaa murqo. Tani waa tallaabo xun waxayna daciifisaa jirka.
Dhaqtarka ayaa ku talinaya in marka Ramadaanka laga reebo, soomidda dhowr maalmood oo ka mid ah maalmaha caadiga ah ay faa'iido u yeelan karto jirka beddelkii aad soonka sii wadi lahayd bilooyin badan oo xiriir ah.
"Soonka bisha Ramadan, haddii si sax ah loo sameeyo, waxay naga caawisaa xoojinta tamarta aan joogto u helno, taas oo ah tallaabo qofku ku dhimayo miisaanka iyadoo uusan jirku waxyeeleyn murqaha."
